name: Epson
description: Epson leads the way in inkjet technology with its revolutionary EcoTank and WorkForce series. Viabtech is an authorized Epson dealer providing sales, support, and service for the full range of Epson printing solutions in Tanzania.

name: Canon
description: Canon is a global leader in imaging technology, offering a comprehensive range of printers, copiers, and multifunction devices for home and office use. As an authorized Canon dealer, Viabtech provides genuine Canon products with full warranty and after-sales support across Tanzania.

name: Lenovo
description: Lenovo offers a robust lineup of enterprise-grade laser printers and multifunction devices built for modern workplaces. As an authorized Lenovo partner, Viabtech stocks the full range of Lenovo printing products with competitive pricing and technical support.

name: Dell
description: Dell printers deliver reliable performance and low total cost of ownership for businesses of all sizes. As an authorized Dell partner, Viabtech provides Dell printing solutions with expert setup, configuration, and ongoing support.

name: HP
description: HP is one of the world's largest and most trusted printer manufacturers, offering versatile inkjet and laser printers for every need. As an authorized HP partner, Viabtech delivers genuine HP products, consumables, and professional support across Tanzania.

name: DJI
description: DJI is the global leader in drone technology and aerial imaging solutions. As an authorized DJI partner, Viabtech provides the latest DJI drones, gimbals, and accessories for commercial, industrial, and creative applications across East Africa.

name: Godox
description: Godox is a world-renowned manufacturer of professional lighting equipment for photographers and videographers. As an authorized Godox partner, Viabtech offers the complete range of Godox studio lights, flashes, and lighting accessories in Tanzania.

name: Unomat
description: Unomat is a trusted name in photography and imaging accessories, offering a wide range of camera bags, tripods, memory card readers, and photo accessories. As an authorized Unomat partner, Viabtech provides the full range of Unomat products with genuine warranty and support.

name: APC
description: APC by Schneider Electric is the global leader in power protection and management solutions. As an authorized APC partner, Viabtech supplies UPS systems, surge protectors, and power management solutions to keep your critical equipment safe and running across Tanzania.

name: SanDisk
description: SanDisk, a Western Digital brand, is the world's leading manufacturer of flash memory storage solutions. As an authorized SanDisk partner, Viabtech offers the complete range of SanDisk memory cards, USB flash drives, and portable SSDs for professionals and consumers.

name: Lexar
description: Lexar is a globally recognized brand specializing in high-performance memory cards and flash storage solutions for photographers, videographers, and professionals. As an authorized Lexar partner, Viabtech delivers genuine Lexar products with full warranty support.
